meaning: adj.闹鬼的,鬼魂出没的,受到折磨的
examples: I think the place we bought is haunted!
There is a special section in the museum which is haunted.
This was that stranger's voice--the stranger of the haunted house.
Rumours of ghosts have haunted the Queen Mary since it came to Long Beach.
At night I slept in spare lodges, haunted by reccurring dreams of the road accident.
